Hornea from 7 to 10 minutes till they are well golden.
Degusta!

crispy-dumpling-salad.name: Crispy Dumpling Salad

ingredients.item: Seasoned rice vinegar or apple cider vinegar

instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 191°C (190°C). Lightly coat the dumplings with cooking spray. Place in the air-fryer basket, and cook for 8–10 minutes, until golden and crisp, shaking dumplings halfway through the cook time.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, vinegar, chili crisp, sesame oil, sugar, ginger, and garlic.
Toss together the salad greens, tomatoes, cucumber, scallions, and cilantro in a large bowl.

Place the cooked dumplings in a large zip-top plastic bag or a bowl. Add the soy sauce dressing, and shake or toss until evenly coated. Arrange the saucy dumplings over the salad. Sprinkle with the sesame seeds. Serve family-style right away, warm, crisp, and packed with flavor.
Enjoy!

crispy-foil-pouches-filled-argiro.name: Crispy Foil Pouches, Filled

ingredients.item: A little sage for the garnish
Fresh ground pepper for gardening (fat cut)
A little sage for the garnish
Fresh ground pepper for gardening (fat cut)

instructions: For these unique appetitors with salmon, cream cheese and crust leaf we will use two sets with 12 mini cases for muffins (each).
We're buttering the cases.
Spread one sheet on the counter. We butter it.
Cut square pieces of 5×5 cm.Stand in the buttered cases 3 leads with a different angle, radially, so that they are left around like face.
With the brush we butter them and push them to sit in the cases. We do the same with the rest of the leads.
Bake them in a well preheated evening at 170 Degrees C for 7'-8', until golden. Let them cool on a grill.
We can prepare them several days early and store them in an airtight box.
Cut the salmon into small stripes. Cut the lime into fillets and then into pieces.
Add the cheese to a disposable cornet. Place some cheese in each case, garnish with a piece of salmon, 1 piece of lime fillet, 2-3 twigs of chives and rub coarsely chopped pepper.

crispy-mustaches-argiro.name: Crispy Mustaches

Mix with wire until the ingredients are well homogenized.
Shake the flower together with baking powder and gradually add to the mixture, kneading until we have a soft dough that does not stick in the hands.
Form the mustards in around or whatever shape we want and place them in sheet coated with parchment paper.
Bake in a preheated oven, in the air, at 170°C for about 30 minutes, until slightly puffed and evening browned.

crustless-cottage-cheese-mini-quiches.name: Crustless Cottage Cheese Mini Quiches
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a jumbo 6-cup muffin tin with cooking spray.
Combine eggs, cottage cheese, and milk in a blender or Vitamix. Blend on low speed to combine, 1 to 5 seconds. Pour mixture into a medium mixing bowl.
Add broccoli, Colby-Jack cheese, and bell pepper to cottage cheese mixture; add garlic salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Divide mixture evenly between the prepared muffin cups.
Bake in the preheated oven until a knife inserted into the center of a quiche comes out clean, about 30 minutes.

curried-cashew-pear-and-grape-salad.name: Curried Cashew, Pear, And Grape Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: In a large, dry skillet over medium-high heat, toast cashews until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Remove cashews to a dish to cool slightly.

Return skillet to medium-high heat, cook bacon strips until crisp on both sides, about 7 minutes. Remove bacon with a slotted spoon, and soak up grease with a paper towel. Coarsely chop bacon, and set aside.
In a medium bowl, stir together butter, rosemary, curry powder, brown sugar, salt, cayenne pepper, and toasted cashews. Set aside.
In a small bowl, stir together white wine vinegar, mustard, and honey. Slowly whisk in olive oil, and sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
In a large salad bowl, toss dressing with greens, pear slices, grapes, and bacon, and sprinkle with nut mixture.

curry-sea-bass-recipe-comedera.name: Curry Sea Bass Recipe

Add curry dough, turmeric and cumin and mix well until the spices release their scent.
Add red pepper and carrot, cook for 3 minutes to impregnate from flavors.
Verter la leche de coco y el caldo de pescado. Remover bien y dejar cocinar a fuego lento por 5 minutos.
Reaping steal steal and place them in the frying pan and put them slightly into the salsa. Cooking with low heat for 8-10 minutes or till the fish is well cooked but juicy.
Remove from fire, add lime juice and sprinkle with fresh cilantro. Serve hot, with your favorite garrison.

3-chile-harissa.name: 3-chile Harissa
instructions: Place árbol, guajillo, and ancho chiles in a large heatproof measuring glass. Pour boiling water over to submerge, cover with plastic wrap, and let sit until chiles are very pliable and cool enough to handle, 15–20 minutes. Drain; remove stems and seeds and discard (wear gloves for this part if you have them).

Toast cumin and coriander in a dry small skillet over medium-low heat, tossing constantly, until very fragrant, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a food processor, add garlic, and pulse until spices are broken up and garlic forms a paste. Add chiles and pulse until chiles form a coarse paste. Add lemon juice, vinegar, tomato paste, paprika, and salt and process until mostly smooth but mixture still has a little texture. With the motor running, stream in ½ cup oil. Process until oil is incorporated.
Transfer harissa to a bowl. Pour remaining ¼ cup oil over top.
Harissa can be made 1 month ahead. Cover and chill.
